sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52575" key="kalh/meros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κᾰλήμερος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n52575.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bringing a fair day</tr_> (opp. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κακήμερος</foreign>), <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.508</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pall.</author> </bibl>); <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">καλήμερε, Χαῖρε</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Mim.Oxy.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">413.67</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
